name: tamakan
description: Tamakan (تمكّن) — KOC Engineering & Reservoir technical learning dashboard

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm -w server run dev" "npm -w client run dev"
scripts.build: npm -w server run build && npm -w client run build
scripts.typecheck: npm -w server run typecheck && npm -w client run typecheck
